response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content and identified it as a Hololive concert. 2. Identified the performers (Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, Houshou Marine) and the song title '#きゅるるん大作戦' from on-screen text. 3. Performed searches for the lyrics of '#きゅるるん大作戦', but no direct lyrics text was found in the search results. 4. Constructed the JSON object with the available metadata.
response.global_summary: A video clip from the 'hololive 3rd Generation Live #きゅるるん大作戦' concert. The first part shows the crowd and stage lights, and the second part features a musical performance by the 3rd Generation members.

scenes.description: Concert stage overview with crowd and stage lighting. No vocal music.
Performance of the song '#きゅるるん大作戦' by Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine.
